name: Roles and Responsibilities
desc: Defines key personnel involved in information security and their respective responsibilities.

name: Detailed Security Protocols

name: Roles and Responsibilities

name: Secure Access Control

desc: Ensures adherence to legal, regulatory, and security compliance standards.
